title: AppError
description: Error data payload carried in JSON-RPC error responses. App codes never fall in the reserved -32768..-32000 range.

rpcCode.description: Numeric JSON-RPC error code. validation_error=1001 filesystem_error=1002 provider_error=1003 database_error=1004 conflict_error=1005 user_cancelled=1006 operation_cancelled=1007 unknown_error=1099

userMessage.description: Human-readable message safe to display in UI

entityRef.description: Affected entity reference (e.g. path, host ID string)
